creator: ken@kdm.org
text:
On Mon, Sep 11, 2000 at 23:21:45 -0500, C. Stephen Gunn wrote:
> On Mon, 11 Sep 2000 00:56:23 CST, "Kenneth D. Merry" wrote:
> 
> I've put a new patch online, same location:
> 
>    http://www.physics.purdue.edu/~csg/FreeBSD/chio.patch
> 
> Some cleanups, command name changes, sanity check some pointers.

Well, I took a look through it this evening, and I don't see any code
problems.  It looks good!

I've made some minor style changes, though, diffs against -current are
attached.

Ken
